scripts.clear: pnpm run clear:dist && pnpm run clear:cache
scripts.deps:push: git add . && git commit -m "build(deps): bumped external dependencies" && git push
scripts.rel:major: pnpm run build && git add . && pnpm version major --force -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.rel:minor: pnpm run build && git add . && pnpm version minor --force -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.rel:patch: pnpm run build && git add . && pnpm version patch --force -m "rel(%s)" && pnpm run rel:push
scripts.format: pnpm run format:prettier && pnpm run format:biome
